locator: Mao Zedong, 'Serve the People,' 8 September 1944; in Selected Works of Mao Tse-tung, Vol. 3 (Peking: Foreign Languages Press, 1965), p. 227; text verified at https://www.marxists.org/reference/archive/mao/selected-works/volume-3/mswv3_19.htm
text: To die for the people is weightier than Mount Tai, but to work for the fascists and die for the exploiters and oppressors is lighter than a feather.

locator: Mao Zedong, 'In Memory of Norman Bethune,' 21 December 1939; in Selected Works of Mao Tse-tung, Vol. 2 (Peking: Foreign Languages Press, 1965), p. 337; text verified at https://www.marxists.org/reference/archive/mao/selected-works/volume-2/mswv2_25.htm
text: We must all learn the spirit of absolute selflessness from him. With this spirit everyone can be very useful to the people.
